steps.generatedText: [Replace with: describe the first screen your new customer sees after signup.] Welcome. You've just signed in for the first time — here's where everything starts. This screen gives you [brief orientation].

[Replace with: describe the first action a new user must take — agree to terms, set a password, confirm email, or skip the tour.] You'll see this button front and center. Go ahead and click it — it only takes a moment and gets you to the good part.

[Replace with: describe the main dashboard — what it shows, which metrics or sections are most important for a new customer.] You'll find your dashboard here. This is your home base — everything you need is one click away from this screen.

overlays.title: This is where you'll spend most of your time.

steps.generatedText: [Replace with: describe the first meaningful thing a new customer should do — create a project, connect an integration, or import data.] This is the moment things get real for you. Click here to [action] — it takes less than two minutes and you'll see results right away.

[Replace with: describe what happens when the first key action completes — the confirmation screen, the new item in the list, or the next prompt.] You've done it. Your [result] is now live. You'll see it appear here in your [list / dashboard / feed] immediately.

[Replace with: describe how to navigate to the team or members page.] You don't have to do this alone. Head over to your Team settings — you can bring colleagues in from here with just their email address.

[Replace with: describe the invite flow — enter email, choose role, send.] Type in your teammate's email address here and hit Send invite. They'll get a link straight to their inbox. No account needed to accept — they'll be guided through setup just like you were.

steps.stepTitle: Access support whenever you need it
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: describe where customers go for help — in-app chat, help center, or dedicated CS contact.] If you ever get stuck, we're right here. You can reach support from anywhere in the app — look for the help icon in the corner. Your CS team is on standby and typically responds within [timeframe].

aiOutputs.title: Client Onboarding — CS Team
aiOutputs.summary: [Replace with: one warm, second-person sentence describing what this walkthrough helps a new customer accomplish in their first session.]
